walletBinding.title: Link Your Wallet
walletBinding.desc: To complete your account setup, please connect and verify your wallet. This enables you to:
walletBinding.connectFirst: Please connect your wallet first to continue
walletBinding.requiredNote: This is required to access wallet-dependent features. Your wallet will be linked to your existing account.
walletBinding.linkDesc: Link your wallet to your SafuSkill account
walletBinding.addressAlreadyRegistered: This wallet address is already registered to another account. Please use a different wallet.
